query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN actorType = 'apt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as apt, SUM(CASE WHEN actorType = 'cybercrime' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cybercrime, SUM(CASE WHEN actorType = 'ransomware' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ransomware, SUM(CASE WHEN actorType = 'hacktivist' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hacktivist, SUM(CASE WHEN threatLevel = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as critical_level, SUM(CASE WHEN threatLevel = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_level FROM threat_actors
